choices.name: Confirmation
choices.choiceText: I confirm the worker I am supplying is fully compliant and is able to work all the shifts listed above

choices.name: Future_Shifts
choices.choiceText: View the next 7 days of shifts

Flow.description: Supplier can view,edit or create workers
Flow.label: VMS - Supplier - Worker Management

fields.name: Shifts_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: New Worker

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a valid NI number with no spaces

fields.name: Future_Shifts_Text
fields.fieldText:
View Shifts


Viewing shifts for:

Name: {!Get_Worker_Details.Name}

National Insurance: {!Get_Worker_Details.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}

fields.name: Success_Text
fields.fieldText:
New Worker


﻿Success!


Worker {!First_Name_New} {!Last_Name_New}has been created

fields.name: Shifts_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Edit Worker

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a valid NI number with no spaces

fields.name: Edit_Worker_Error
fields.fieldText:
Edit Worker


Error!


The national insurance number matches another worker, details below:


Worker Name: {!NI_Loop_Edit.Name}

Worker NI: {!NI_Loop.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}

Worker DOB: {!NI_Loop.Birthdate}

fields.name: Shifts_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Edit Worker


Error!


The national insurance number matches another worker, details below:


Worker Name: {!NI_Loop_Edit.Name}

Worker NI: {!NI_Loop.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}

Worker DOB: {!NI_Loop.Birthdate}

fields.name: Shifts_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Worker Details

fields.name: Worker_Details_Text
fields.fieldText:
Name: {!Get_Worker_Details.Name}


National Insurance: {!Get_Worker_Details.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}


Date of Birth: {!Get_Worker_Details.Birthdate}


Address:

{!Get_Worker_Details.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Worker_Details.MailingCity}

{!Get_Worker_Details.MailingState}

{!Get_Worker_Details.MailingPostalCode}


Email: {!Get_Worker_Details.Email}


Phone: {!Get_Worker_Details.MobilePhone}
